content.en:
Time passed slowly, Ye Tian was not in a hurry, and waited silently.

this day.

The White Birch Controller prepares to travel to another place, and he shuttles through the Boundary River Void of the Thirteenth Boundary River.

At this time, he didn't worry about anything, after all, the matter of the Heaven Devouring Sect had not yet spread, even if many Eternal Masters were missing, if no one advertised it, the White Birch Masters naturally didn't know very well.

Otherwise, he would definitely go into hiding, and would not dare to go out at will.

Ye Tian followed behind the white birch controller, and with his strength, the white birch controller naturally couldn't perceive it.

Originally, Ye Tian thought that this time it was in vain, but at this moment, he sensed a special fluctuation.

"There's a fish on the hook!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Airplanes!!!!

The white birch controller was frozen, time and space froze, he couldn't resist the unknown powerhouse, he could only watch himself being captured by the other party.

But just as one of the other party's big hands was about to grab him, a voice came.

"Three Realms level controller, you have a lot of courage!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian made a move.

I saw Ye Tian cast nine flashes of thunder, and instantly came to the other party's face, and slapped his palm on the other party's body.

The Three Realms-level controllers were like ants to Ye Tian, if they wanted to kill him, they could kill him in an instant.

But Ye Tian didn't want to kill him for the time being, so he wanted to spare his life.

Because Ye Tian knew very well that this Three Realms-level controller was definitely not the person behind the scenes, and if the person behind the scenes was only a Three-Realm level controller, he would never dare to be so arrogant.

Bang!

The body of this Three Realms level master was cracked, his will was shattered, and he was seriously injured and dying.

Immediately, Ye Tian directly sealed it.

"I've seen the Endless Master!"

The white birch controller recognized Ye Tian and said respectfully.

At this moment, he was very happy, he thought that he would definitely die, but he didn't expect that at the critical moment, Ye Tian would actually help, which was too coincidental.

And he didn't know that Ye Tian had been following him for a long time, otherwise he would definitely show an extremely strange look.

"White Birch Master, if it's okay, don't go out recently. "

Ye Tian reminded, it can be regarded as making up for following him.

"Why?" Bai Birch was a little puzzled, but after thinking about it carefully, he didn't seem to have offended this Three Realms level master, why did the other party attack him!

This is the Three Realms level master, far beyond his existence, he usually sees it respectfully, where dare to offend!

"There are some things that the more you know, the more you know. "

Ye Tian said.

"I see!"

The master of the white birch knew that the matter must be very serious, and coupled with this attack, he suddenly did not dare to go out, and immediately went back.

And Ye Tian took this Three Realm-level controller to Tongyang Mountain in the Origin Realm Sea.

"Infinite Master, let me go!"

The Three Realms-level controller said coldly, but he was still very frightened in his heart, and he just forcibly calmed down.

"Tai Blood Master, you should have cultivated the Heaven Snatching Technique, you let me let you go, do you think it's possible?" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"You...... Do you know me?"

The one who is too bloody is blinded.

He has no fame at all, he has been cultivating secretly, and before he became the eternal master, he was just a small minion.

And how could an eternal controller like Ye Tian know him at a glance?

The master of the Tai Blood naturally didn't know, Ye Tian knew his name through the exploration of the copying talent, but more things could not be known.

Therefore, he needs to capture the controller of the Taixue and interrogate some information.

"You don't care how I know you, in short, you better be honest, otherwise you will be worse than dead. "

Ye Tian said coldly.

Tongyang Mountain.

Ye Tian came back with the Tai Blood Controller, and how to interrogate at the beginning, the Tai Blood Controller did not reveal any information.

Moreover, Ye Tian also knew the news of his capture of the master of the Taiblood, and the forces behind him must have known about it.

After all, the Tyrant Blood Controller must have an avatar left somewhere else, and he can't stop the information from being passed on.

But he expected that the other party would not be able to save people, otherwise he would fall for his scheme.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian learned all kinds of torturous secret techniques from the library pavilion of Wanyuan Mountain, which he used to entertain the master of the Taiblood.

He didn't believe that the Tyrant Blood Controller would keep talking.

-----------------

Origin Boundary Sea.

A mysterious place, where a group of Eternal Masters are deliberating.

"It's too bloody to be caught. "

"Who caught him? He is also a Three Realms-level controller, and if a group of weak people on the other side attack, will he still miss?"

"It's an endless controller from the Thirteen Realms River, the other party is a six-realm level controller, with incomparably demonic talent, and it is said that he is also a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor. "

"The personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, this is troublesome, we can't afford to provoke the Ten Elements Ancestor!"

"Tai Blood was too careless, and he was caught by the Endless Master. "

"What to do now, if the Tyrant of the Blood reveals our existence, it will be dangerous. "

"Move the headquarters first, just in case. As for the incarnation of the Tai Blood Master, control it first. In addition, those members whose names are known to the Tai Blood Masters are to be hidden first. "

"So be it. "

Soon, the group of Eternal Masters was gone.

Time flies.

Ye Tian constantly tortured the Tai Blood Controller, and many of the secret techniques that tortured people were all acting on the will of the other party, he was like an ordinary person who had been tortured countless times.

His will seemed to collapse again and again, and in the endless torment, his state of mind finally could not bear it.

"Please, give me a good time. "

The Blood Controller said weakly.

He wanted to commit suicide, but he couldn't, every time he committed suicide, Ye Tian would stop him.

At this moment, he was really scared.

"Tell me, which force are you from, and who is behind it?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Tai Blood Controller said: "I said, the force I belong to is called the Heaven Restoration Sect, the purpose is to reproduce the glory of the Heaven Devouring Sect, it has existed for countless years, there are a total of one hundred and eight members, and only the eternal master who can capture the heavens can join it. Moreover, each Eternal Master can recommend one person to join the Heaven-Destroying Sect and learn the Heaven-Snatching Technique. The Futian Sect can't develop too many people, otherwise everyone will practice the Heaven Snatching Technique, which is tantamount to finding competitors for themselves. As a result, the number of people in the Restoration Sect has always been small. And my status in the Futian Sect is not very high, only ranked seventy-three. "

"The Futian Sect has three deputy sect masters, each of whose strength is above the Seven Realms-level controllers, it is said that the strength of the sect masters is very likely to be at the Eight Realms-level controllers, but the sect masters have not appeared for a long time, and I can't see him, so I don't know. In addition, several deputy sect leaders and sect leaders and even members whose status is within the top thirty are life-saving, and I am not qualified to know, I only know the identities of some members in the back. "

"I can only tell you who the other members are, and I really don't know the others. "

Subsequently, the Taixue Controller said a series of names, and Ye Tian wrote them down one by one.

After confirming that the other party was not lying, Ye Tian took action to kill the Taixue controller and relieved the other party's pain.
